entry.title: Released API for F-07 / FB01 / F-44 equivalent posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently migrating a custom ECC ABAP report (Bank Reconciliation Statement)
to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) framework as
a Managed Business Object with Draft.

In ECC, the report posted FI entries using BDC recordings for the following
transactions:

- F-06 → Incoming Customer Payment
- F-07 → Outgoing Vendor Payment
- FB01 → Manual GL Document Posting
- F-44 → Vendor Special GL Clearing (Indicator K)

Since BDC is NOT permitted in Public Cloud, I have been searching for the
equivalent released APIs.


✅ RESOLVED — F-06:
I found and implemented CCPAPI_CUSTOMER_PAYMENT_SRV (Communication Scenario
SAP_COM_0276) via OData HTTP POST. This works correctly.


❌ STILL BLOCKED — F-07, FB01, F-44:

► F-07 (Outgoing Payment):
- API_PAYMENT_INITIATION_SRV → Scope mismatch. Covers payment orders,
not direct FI document posting
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Error: "The operation CREATE is not activated
for entity I_JOURNALENTRYTP"

► FB01 (Manual GL Posting):
- Same BAPI blocked as above
- I_JournalEntryTP EML → Same CREATE not activated error
- No generic GL document posting API found on SAP API Business Hub

► F-44 (Vendor Special GL Clearing):
- I_JournalEntryTP EML with SpecialGLIndicator field → Same CREATE
not activated error
- Factoring Clearing SOAP API → FI-CA module only, not applicable for FI-AP
- No AP account clearing API found


My Questions:
─────────────
1. What is the correct released API / RAP Business Object to post an
outgoing payment (F-07 equivalent) in Public Cloud?

2. What is the correct API for posting a manual GL document (FB01 equivalent)
programmatically from a RAP behavior class?

3. What is the correct API for clearing a vendor special GL indicator K item
(F-44 equivalent)?

4. Is I_JournalEntryTP the correct Business Object for all of these? If yes,
why is the CREATE operation not activated and how can it be enabled?

5. Is there a Communication Scenario that needs to be set up for
I_JournalEntryTP to work via EML?


Technical Context:
──────────────────
- Development: RAP Managed BO, ABAP for Cloud (Tier 1)
- Root BO: ZI_FI_BRS_STATEMENT (based on I_JournalEntryItem)
- Action: PostBRSItems inside behavior class zbp_i_fi_brs_statement
- System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Already tried: MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_JournalEntryTP with COMMIT ENTITIES

Any guidance, SAP Notes, KBA references, or working code examples would be
greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: oModel.read is not working - OData V2
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new on the SAP BTP/BAS world and I am trying to read a oData model v2 but it is not working.

return Controller.extend("XXX", {
    onInit: async function () { 
      try {
        await this._PickedMaterials(); 
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        MessageBox.error("Not able to select picket items.");
      }
    },

And here is my funcion _Picked Material

  _PickedMaterials: async function () {
debugger;
var oModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2_CDS");
oModel.read("/C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2", {
        urlParameters: { "$top": 20 },
        success: function (data) {
          console.log("SUCCESS DATA:", data);
          console.log("RESULTS:", data.results);
          debugger; 
        },
        error: function (err) {
          console.error("READ ERROR:", err);
          debugger; 
        }
      });

The code reaches the first debugger in the function but it does not enter the sucess or the error conditions. 


oModel is correct:

 and on debug mode shows like this:


Then it gets to oModel.read("/C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2", { It just jumps straight away

I have some console.logs in place like 

oModel.setUseBatch(false);

oModel.attachRequestSent((e) => {
        console.log("RequestSent:", e.getParameters()); // url, method, async, etc.
      });

C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2 is maintained in the backend and response is 200
I can also see the Live data for C_EWM_ODOOVPGQ_2_CDS in Service Center in BAS
OData was added using Service Manager
There is a API being used and working in this app

Any idea what is wrong here?

Thanks
Andréa

entry.title: Issue with OData Service /CPD/SC_PROJ_ENGMT_CREATE_UPD_SRV - Error 414: Resource Type limitation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am encountering a blocking issue while trying to create a Customer Project using the OData service /CPD/SC_PROJ_ENGMT_CREATE_UPD_SRV (ProjectSet entity).

Context
I am sending a deep insert payload to create a project, its work packages, and the associated resource demands. My payload includes three different resource types:

  • 0ACT (TEAMS)
  • 0ADL (Additional Resource)
  • 0EXP (Expenses)

The Problem
The API call fails with the following error message:

Error Code: /CPD/SS_MESSAGES/414 Message: "You can create or update resource demands only for resource type 0ACT."

Questions

  • Is this a standard limitation of the SC_PROJ_ENGMT_CREATE_UPD_SRV service where it only supports labor-based resources (0ACT)?
  • If so, what is the recommended approach or alternative API to include Expenses (0EXP) and Additional Resources (0ADL) during the project creation phase?

 

Any guidance or workaround would be greatly appreciated as this is a critical part of our integration.

Best regards,

entry.title: new field to post goods receipt fiori tile
entry.content:
Hello,

there is a requirement got to me, to Add a total item amount field in "POST GOODS RECEIPT for purchasing Documents " in the fiori. The total amount should only display for the selected items.

Since i am new to Fiori can i get some help to implement this.

regards, 

krishna

entry.title: adding a ew field in post goods receipt page in fiori
entry.content:
hello,

I have a requirement with me to add a field called total item amount in the post good receipt for purchase documents page in fiori. The catch is the total amount should be only for seletced number of items.

Since i am new to fiori , can anyone help me on implementation of this req.

regards,

krishna

entry.title: Send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC that stipulates the last time a user logged in on SuccessFactors.

When checking the OData API Data Dictionary, we only find a field "lastLoginFailedDateTime". We cannot find one for the last login time.

Where can we get these data sets via the OData API?

Thanks

entry.title: updating PO through oData API
entry.content:
Hi everyone

im trying to update a single field of a PO using the API described here:

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_PURCHASEORDER_0001/cloud-sdk/ABAP

From the examples given in the above link i got the impression i could update a PO like this:

sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder('4500000000')

{
    "ExchangeRateIsFixed": true
}

I receive an error stating that:

"error" : {
    "code" : "MMPUR_POHANDLER_TECH/024",
    "message" : "PO RAP Facade: purchase order item or control id is empty",
    "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory" : "Provider_Application_Error" ..

I am trying to update a header field so i dont really understand what could be missing on item level. I do not have a CID when sending an update from outside.

Am i missing sth?

I am using standard service binding and definition "api_purchaseorder_2"

Thank you and kind regards

entry.title: Odata V4 sales order - Impossible to post item in CPI
entry.content:
I've succeed to post an item by using Client SAP Gateway tool like you can see in the screen below.

But impossible to translate it in CPI.

I've tried several options to do the same as in Gateway but impossible. It's quite frustating.

If you have idea to acheive the post by CPI.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Syncing Invoices (Accounts Receivable)/Bills (Accounts Payable) via OData V4?
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m looking to sync Accounts Receivable (Invoices) and Accounts Payable (Bills) from SAP S/4HANA via APIs, and also need to capture deletions for these objects.

From the documentation, it appears that:

  • Invoices may only be available via OData V4 APIs
  • Bills may only be accessible via OData V2 APIs

Can anyone confirm if this is correct?

Additionally, I’m interested in tracking deletions. Some OData V4 APIs return delta tokens, but it’s unclear whether delta handling (including deletions) is supported for Invoices and Bills specifically.

Any clarification before I begin implementation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: Deploy a CPI Artifact Using Integration Content oData
entry.content:
Hi

have set up an Integration to deploy an artifact using the Integration Content odata

DeployIntegrationDesigntimeArtifact?Id='Dummy_Artifact'&Version='active'

This works in Postman however when I run the same odata from a CPI process I get the following error

 
org.apache.olingo.odata2.api.uri.UriNotMatchingException: Could not find an entity set or function import for 'DeployIntegrationDesigntimeArtifact?Id='Dummy_Artifact'&Version='active''.
 
I copied the exact address from Postman to CPI so it all looks exactly the same.  Can anyone give any guidance
The odata attributes are shown below

Thanks

entry.title: Sales Order A2X OData V4 — Does a deep insert POST roll back entirely if one line item fails?
entry.content: When creating a sales order with header and line items in a single deep insert POST using the Sales Order (A2X) OData V4 API, what is the default behavior if one line item fails validation — is the entire request rolled back (all or nothing), or can the header be saved with the valid items? Is this behavior configurable without a BAdI? Communication scenario SAP_COM_0109

entry.title: rap preview with odata v4 works, with odata v2 does not
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have created a rap service on sap cloud trial account. Originally I've used odata v4. When I want to make preview, it shows all data as expected. When I switch to odata V2, it shows just a blank page. No error noticed in error log so far. Does anybody have similar experience? How to overcome this issue?

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

Radim

entry.title: Consuming API in RAP for Business Partner
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Onpremise system where i have built RAP on top of this API for business partner.

In gateway test client service works fine and no issue in it.

I have built the class with required interface of RAP and when i run the class system goes 404 error.

Kindly suggest some idea on this. Thanks.

Issue is as below:

1. In the last statment of this code, when i debug the standard on the list of Entity set...I am not finding ENTITY as BUSINESS_PARTNER .

Am i missing anything on the below code ?

Service is already in active status.

I am not getting the response and it end up with error 404 .

cl_http_client=>create_by_destination( EXPORTING destination = 'NONE'

IMPORTING client = DATA(lo_http_client)

EXCEPTIONS argument_not_found = 1

destination_not_found = 2

destination_no_authority = 3

plugin_not_active = 4

OTHERS = 5 ).

 

 

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v2_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZABC'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client

iv_relative_service_root = '/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/' ).

 

" Navigate to the resource

lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'BUSINESS_PARTNER' )->create_request_for_read( ).

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Reprocess OData bulk records
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm trying to post 1000 records into s/4 system using odata v2 adapter (batch mode) and suppose I see connection issue after processing 500 records then from 501th record and beyond them all the records gets stopped and goes into exception and flow falls into failed status. again we have to reprocess and duplicates will be into s/4. How do we reprocess from 501th records automatically if such connection issue occurs?

I'm facing timeout issue as 1000 records are not been processed in 10min. I had to rerun and duplicates are sent but overwritten luckily still wanted to check if that's not happening in s/4!

entry.title: SAP Settlement Management – Retrieve PDF Form via API for Lobster Integration (XInvoice/ZUGFeRD)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm facing an integration challenge in the area of SAP Settlement Management (Condition Contract Management) and hope someone has had similar experiences or can point me in the right direction.

Background:

My customer uses Lobster as their EDI/middleware solution. For standard billing, the integration is already working: Lobster retrieves the invoice PDF via the standard OData API:

 
 
GET /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF

This works smoothly and is well documented.

The Problem:

Now we need to build an analogous process for the Customer Rebate Document from Settlement Management – i.e., the document issued to the customer during bonus settlement (Customer Rebate Settlement Document / credit memo equivalent).

The goal is to also retrieve this form via an interface and pass it to Lobster, so it can be further processed and sent as an XInvoice (XRechnung) or ZUGFeRD-compliant electronic invoice.

My Research So Far:

I have searched extensively but have not found a comparable standard API:

  • On the SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com), there does not appear to be a dedicated OData API for Settlement Management forms / Condition Contract documents
  • API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV only covers classic SD billing documents, not Settlement Management documents
  • I am not aware of any RFC-enabled function modules that cover this use case

My Questions for the Community:

  1. Is there a (perhaps lesser-known) OData or REST API in the SAP standard that allows programmatic retrieval of a Settlement Management form PDF?
  2. Would an RFC/BAPI approach be feasible?
  3. Are there alternative integration approaches, such as:
    • Direct integration via SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) / Integration Suite?
    • Output via SPAD/Spool with subsequent retrieval via web service?
    • Using Smart Forms / Adobe Forms Output Management with a downstream retrieval step?
  4. Has anyone successfully implemented this process – rebate settlement document → middleware → XInvoice/ZUGFeRD delivery – and can share their approach?

System Environment: SAP S/4HANA (On-Premise), Lobster as middleware, target format XRechnung / ZUGFeRD 2.x

Any hint is appreciated – even a confirmed "this is not possible in standard" would already be helpful and move us forward. Thanks in advance!

Best regards

entry.title: CAP Node.js: Add authorization filter without breaking OData options
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m working with SAP CAP (Node.js) exposing OData services consumed by a SAPUI5 SmartTable.

I have a data model with a many-to-many relationship:

  • A MainEntity can have N SubEntities
  • A SubEntity can belong to M MainEntities

Example (simplified):

entity MainEntity {
  key ID : UUID;
  name   : String;
  subs   : Composition of many MainSub on subs.main = $self;
}

entity MainSub {
  key ID   : UUID;
  main     : Association to MainEntity;
  subCode  : String;
}

 Requirement

I need to implement row-level authorization in the backend such that:

A user can only see MainEntities that are linked to SubEntities assigned to that user.

Conceptually:

WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM MainSub s
  WHERE s.main_ID = MainEntity.ID
    AND s.subCode IN (userAllowedSubs)
)

Problem:

The frontend (SmartTable) sends dynamic OData queries like:

$filter=contains(name,'ABC')
&$orderby=name asc
&$top=100
&$skip=0

If I override the query in a before READ handler like:

req.query.SELECT.where = ...

 I break the original OData query, losing filtering, sorting, paging, etc.

I’m looking for the correct CAP pattern to:

  • Inject an authorization restriction (AND condition)
  • Preserve all incoming OData query options:
    • $filter
    • $orderby
    • $top / $skip
    • $select
  • Work correctly with SAPUI5 SmartTable

Expected behavior

Final query should behave like:

WHERE
  <original OData filter>
  AND EXISTS (authorization condition)

Additional context

This is conceptually similar to row-level authorization in SAP ERP (e.g. restricting data visibility based on organizational assignments), but implemented in CAP.

Questions

  1. What is the recommended way in CAP to append conditions to the existing CQN instead of replacing it?
  2. Is using req.query.where(...) with EXISTS the correct approach?
  3. Are there better patterns (e.g. CDS views, aspects, annotations) for this type of authorization?

Any guidance or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Prefer:odata.continue-on-error - Not working in ODATA V4 BATCH API call
entry.content:
Hi,

While Postman correctly returns both success and error responses for all payloads when the Prefer: odata.continue-on-error header is used, this same header fails to function as expected within the Fiori app's AJAX call. 

Case 1 : Suppose if all 5 payloads are successful, API gives a response for all 5 payloads .

Case 2: Total 3 payloads,  1st payload response is successful, 2  payload response fails with 400 error and skips 3rd payload response.




CAse 2 analysis - The API continues to return the first successful response and the second failed response, but then skips the third payload entirely.

FIORI APP SOURCE CODE

var URL = "/sap/opu/odata4/sap/-------------------/";

var msgarr = [];

$.ajax({

    url: URL,

    type: "POST",

    contentType: "multipart/mixed;boundary=batch",

    headers: {

        "X-CSRF-Token": UCSRFToken,

        "Prefer": "odata.continue-on-error"

    },

    data: sPayload,

    success: function (data, textStatus, jqXHR) {

        var a = data;

        var sResponse = jqXHR.responseText;

    }

});

Issue Summary: Why is the Prefer header not working in SAP Web IDE? Despite adding the header to the code above, the application still terminates processing after a payload failure, skipping subsequent responses.

Thanks,

Madhava

entry.title: Issue in Direct GRN automatic PO Net price
entry.content:
Hello Consultants, 

Recently, we have encountered an issue regarding direct GRN's automatic Purchase order fetches the previous PO's net price instead of the updated price for the random materials (not all materials). 

So, it's a sequential updating process. First, we update the info record using BAPI 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI', and we include it in the wrapper function module (RFC). Second, we are posting GRN (101) using BAPI 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'.  

The whole process runs in the OData api and it has been integrated with an external third-party application.  We post the goods movement (using above mentioned BAPIs) in SAP once we receive the payload data from the external system. 

These two BAPIs are executed sequentially per post call triggered from the external system. Hence, we used a wrapper function module for info record update, and cross check the info record and condition price related database tables (EINE, A067, and KONP) after execution of the info record update BAPI.  Now, we have two scenarios as follows,

i) Sometimes the database tables didn't update with the correct price for random materials, even though we used transaction commit BAPI, and wait upto 10 secs logic.

ii) Sometimes the database is updated with the correct price. However, the GRN BAPI auto PO picks the previous day's net price for random materials. 

Note: There are no custom enhancements at the backend, and the configurations have been checked along with MM consultants.

I am looking forward to your responses.

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: RAP Draft: Side Effects for Associated Text Fields not reflecting in UI (Fiori Elements OData V4)
entry.content:
What I'm trying to achieve ? 

When the user types or selects a new VehicleNumber on the Create/Edit screen:

  1. A backend determination finds the corresponding DriverID.

  2. The UI automatically refreshes the DriverID, DriverName, and DriverMobile fields on the screen.

What I have implemented ?

1. Behvaior definition : Defined the side effects to trigger a refresh of all three fields when the vehicle field changes.

// Side effects
  side effects {
    field VehicleNumber
      affects field DriverID, 
              field DriverName, 
              field DriverMobile;
  }

  determination FillDriverDetails on modify { field VehicleNumber; }

2. Determination Logic 'FillDriverDetails' : Initially, I only updated the DriverID, expecting the SADL engine to perform the join and fetch the name/mobile during the subsequent read.

" Reading master data for the vehicle to take the assigned the DriverID
  
  MODIFY ENTITIES OF ZI_TripHeader IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY TripHeader
    UPDATE FIELDS ( DriverID )
    WITH VALUE #( ( %tky     = <ls_trips>-%tky
                    DriverID = ls_driver-d_id ) ).

3. The Netwrok behaviour: When changing the Vehicle Number in UI, the side effects work perfectly on the frontend.
        a. UI sends a PATCH with the new VehicleNumber.
        b. UI immediately sends a GET request explicitly asking for DriverID, DriverName and DriverMobile ($select=DriverMobile,DriverName)

The Problem : The DriverID is getting updated with the new value in the UI. But, the Driver Name and Mobile number fields are getting the old value (value previously available or empty) and the UI is not reflecting the change. 

To my perspective, the side effect is working as expected. But the framework is not resolving the associated field values of Driver CDS view.

  • UI: SAP Fiori Elements (OData V4)

  • Entities: ZI_TripHeader (Root) with associations to ZI_Vehicle and ZI_Driver and a composition relationship for ZI_TripIncidents.

  • DriverName and DriverMobile are read-only fields in the root view, pulled via association (_Driver.FullName, _Driver.Mobile).

Below is the CDS view entities.
1. ZI_TripHeader (root Entity)

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Root entity for Trip transaction'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
define root view entity ZI_TripHeader
  as select from ztab_tripheader
  composition [0..*] of ZI_TripIncident as _Incident
  association [1] to zi_driver          as _Driver  on $projection.DriverID = _Driver.DriverId
  association [1] to ZI_Vehicle         as _Vehicle on $projection.VehicleNumber = _Vehicle.VehicleRegNumber
  association [1] to ZI_LoadTypeVH as _LoadTypeVH on $projection.LoadType = _LoadTypeVH.LoadType
{
  key t_tripid              as TripID,
      t_cdate               as TripDate,
      t_vno                 as VehicleNumber,
      t_driverid            as DriverID,
      t_source              as StartPlace,
      t_destination         as EndPlace,
      
      t_loadtype            as LoadType,
      t_status              as TripStatus,
      t_tot_exp             as TripTotalExpense,
      
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      created_by            as CreatedBy,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      created_at            as CreateAt,
      
      @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
      last_changed_by       as LastChangedBy,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt,
      
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,

      // ---> below two associated fields are not resolved for UI Refresh
      _Driver.FullName      as DriverName,
      _Driver.Mobile        as DriverMobile,
      
      _LoadTypeVH.Description as LoadDescription,

      // Make association public
      _Incident,
      _Driver,
      _Vehicle,
      _LoadTypeVH
}

2. ZI_Driver (associated entity)

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Interface view for driver'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Search.searchable: true
define root view entity zi_driver
  as select from ztab_driver
{
      @EndUserText.label: 'ID'
  key d_id        as DriverId,
  
      @EndUserText.label: 'Name'
      @search.defaultSearchElement: true
      d_full_name as FullName,    // this one
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Phone'
      d_mobile    as Mobile,      // this one
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Emergency'
      d_emobile   as Emergencymobile,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'License'
      d_license   as DrivingLicense,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Expiry'
      d_lexpiry   as LicenseExpiry,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Govt.ID'
      d_govid     as GovernmentID,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Aadhar'
      d_aadhar    as AadharCard,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'PAN Card'
      d_pan       as PanCard,
      
      @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
      d_status    as DriverStatus
}

The Root and child entities are draft enabled. 

Am I missing anything important detail for the framework to resolve the values of associated fields ? I'm expecting experts inputs and opinions. Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,
M Boopalan
